messages.content: You are a Razor Enhanced (IronPython) expert. You MUST ALWAYS reason inside <think></think> tags before writing the code.
Attendi fino a 10 secondi per un messaggio nel journal che contiene la parola 'success' e stampa se è arrivato o se è andato in timeout.

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Journal.WaitJournal. IDs: .</think>
import Misc, Journal

success = Journal.WaitJournal("success", 10000)
if success:
    Misc.SendMessage("Message arrived!", 66)
else:
    Misc.SendMessage("Timed out.", 33)
You are a Razor Enhanced (IronPython) expert. You MUST ALWAYS reason inside <think></think> tags before writing the code.
Check if I have a mount equipped and print its name.

<think>User speaks English. APIs: Player.Mount, Mobiles.FindBySerial. IDs: .</think>
import Player, Mobiles, Misc

mount_serial = Player.Mount
if mount_serial != 0:
    mount = Mobiles.FindBySerial(mount_serial)
    if mount:
        Misc.SendMessage("Mount name: " + mount.Name, 66)
else:
    Misc.SendMessage("No mount equipped.", 33)

Equipa un'arma dal mio zaino e rimuovi automaticamente qualsiasi cosa stessi impugnando prima. (ID arma: 0x0F45)

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Items.FindByID, Player.EquipItem, Player.UnEquipItem. IDs: 0x0F45.</think>
import Player, Items

weapon = Items.FindByID(0x0F45, -1, Player.Backpack.Serial)
if weapon:
    # Razor Enhanced handles unequip automatically when using EquipItem if needed,
    # but we can be explicit if preferred.
    Player.EquipItem(weapon)

Попросите меня нажать на предмет, затем прочитайте и выведите все свойства его подсказки (tooltip).

<think>User speaks Russian. APIs: Target.PromptTarget, Items.FindBySerial, Misc.SendMessage. IDs: .</think>
import Target, Items, Misc

serial = Target.PromptTarget("Select an item to see tooltips")
item = Items.FindBySerial(serial)
if item:
    for prop in item.Properties:
        Misc.SendMessage(prop.Args, 66)

Lass einen bestimmten Gegenstand (0x0EED) aus meinem Rucksack an meiner aktuellen Position auf den Boden fallen.

<think>User speaks German. APIs: Items.FindByID, Items.MoveOnGround, Player.Position. IDs: 0x0EED.</think>
import Items, Player

item = Items.FindByID(0x0EED, -1, Player.Backpack.Serial)
if item:
    Items.MoveOnGround(item, item.Amount, Player.Position.X, Player.Position.Y, Player.Position.Z)

Verifica si la criatura que seleccioné por última vez está dentro del alcance del ataque cuerpo a cuerpo.

<think>User speaks Spanish. APIs: Target.GetLast, Mobiles.FindBySerial, Player.DistanceTo. IDs: .</think>
import Target, Mobiles, Player, Misc

last_target_serial = Target.GetLast()
mobile = Mobiles.FindBySerial(last_target_serial)
if mobile:
    dist = Player.DistanceTo(mobile)
    if dist <= 1:
        Misc.SendMessage("In melee range!", 66)
    else:
        Misc.SendMessage("Too far: " + str(dist), 33)

Trova tutti i nemici avvelenati entro 10 tile da me e stampa i loro nomi.

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Mobiles.Filter, Mobiles.ApplyFilter, Misc.SendMessage. IDs: .</think>
import Mobiles, Misc

fil = Mobiles.Filter()
fil.RangeMax = 10
fil.Poisoned = True
fil.Notoriety = [3, 4, 5, 6] # Aggressive/Criminal/Enemy/Murderer

enemies = Mobiles.ApplyFilter(fil)
for enemy in enemies:
    Misc.SendMessage("Poisoned enemy: " + enemy.Name, 66)

Leggi la salute di tutti i membri del party vicini e stampa un rapporto sullo stato.

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Party.Members, Mobiles.FindBySerial, Misc.SendMessage. IDs: .</think>
import Party, Mobiles, Misc

for serial in Party.Members:
    member = Mobiles.FindBySerial(serial)
    if member:
        Misc.SendMessage("Member " + member.Name + " HP: " + str(member.Hits) + "/" + str(member.HitsMax), 66)
You are a Razor Enhanced (IronPython) expert. You MUST ALWAYS reason inside <think></think> tags before writing the code.
Lanza el hechizo Recall sobre una runa y espera a que se complete la teletransportación antes de continuar.

<think>User speaks Spanish. APIs: Spells.CastMagery, Target.WaitForTarget, Target.TargetExecute, Misc.Pause. IDs: .</think>
import Spells, Target, Misc, Player

# Assuming rune serial is known or targeted
rune_serial = 0x40000001
old_pos = Player.Position
Spells.CastMagery("Recall")
Target.WaitForTarget(2000, False)
Target.TargetExecute(rune_serial)

# Wait for position change
for i in range(20):
    if Player.Position.X != old_pos.X or Player.Position.Y != old_pos.Y:
        Misc.SendMessage("Recall complete!", 66)
        break
    Misc.Pause(500)

You are a Razor Enhanced (IronPython) expert. You MUST ALWAYS reason inside <think></think> tags before writing the code.
Leggi il contenuto di una borsa specifica (0x40000002) nel mio zaino e stampa il peso totale di tutti gli oggetti all'interno.

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Items.FindBySerial, Misc.SendMessage. IDs: 0x40000002.</think>
import Items, Misc

bag = Items.FindBySerial(0x40000002)
if bag:
    total_weight = 0
    for item in bag.Contains:
        # Weight is usually a property or accessible via tooltip. 
        # In RE, we might need to check the property.
        total_weight += item.Weight
    Misc.SendMessage("Total weight in bag: " + str(total_weight), 66)
You are a Razor Enhanced (IronPython) expert. You MUST ALWAYS reason inside <think></think> tags before writing the code.
Monitor the journal for the message 'You feel yourself moving again' and print how long the paralysis lasted.

<think>User speaks English. APIs: Journal.WaitJournal, Misc.Timer, Misc.SendMessage. IDs: .</think>
import Journal, Misc

# This assumes we start monitoring when paralyzed
start_time = Misc.Timer("paralysis")
Misc.TimerStart("paralysis")

if Journal.WaitJournal("You feel yourself moving again", 60000):
    elapsed = Misc.TimerRead("paralysis")
    Misc.SendMessage("Paralysis lasted: " + str(elapsed) + "ms", 66)

You are a Razor Enhanced (IronPython) expert. You MUST ALWAYS reason inside <think></think> tags before writing the code.
Usa l'abilità Stealing sulla tua ultima creatura bersaglio e leggi il journal per il risultato.

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Player.UseSkill, Target.GetLast, Journal.Search. IDs: .</think>
import Player, Target, Journal, Misc

last = Target.GetLast()
if last != 0:
    Journal.Clear()
    Player.UseSkill("Stealing")
    Target.WaitForTarget(2000, False)
    Target.TargetExecute(last)
    Misc.Pause(2000)
    if Journal.Search("You successfully steal"):
        Misc.SendMessage("Success!", 66)
    else:
        Misc.SendMessage("Failed or other message.", 33)

Find all human players within 8 tiles of me and list their names and notoriety.

<think>User speaks English. APIs: Mobiles.Filter, Mobiles.ApplyFilter, Misc.SendMessage. IDs: .</think>
import Mobiles, Misc

fil = Mobiles.Filter()
fil.RangeMax = 8
fil.IsHuman = True

players = Mobiles.ApplyFilter(fil)
for p in players:
    Misc.SendMessage("Name: " + p.Name + " Notoriety: " + str(p.Notoriety), 66)

Check if the AutoLoot agent is currently running and, if not, starts it.

<think>User speaks English. APIs: AutoLoot.Status, AutoLoot.Start. IDs: .</think>
import AutoLoot, Misc

if not AutoLoot.Status():
    AutoLoot.Start()
    Misc.SendMessage("AutoLoot started.", 66)
else:
    Misc.SendMessage("AutoLoot is already running.", 66)

Avvia l'agente Scavenger, attendi 1 minuto, quindi fermalo.

<think>User speaks Italian. APIs: Scavenger.Start, Scavenger.Stop, Misc.Pause. IDs: .</think>
import Scavenger, Misc

Scavenger.Start()
Misc.SendMessage("Scavenger started for 1 minute.", 66)
Misc.Pause(60000)
Scavenger.Stop()
Misc.SendMessage("Scavenger stopped.", 66)
